zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线弱势震荡，空头仍占主导
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前报价9.1477，24小时波动极窄，显示市场观望情绪较浓。价格运行于20日均线9.2274下方，短期趋势依旧偏空，反弹力度有限，整体维持弱势震荡结构。

从技术指标看，MACD维持负值，说明空头动能尚未完全释放，短线仍有下探压力。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格表现与均线压制情况，市场买盘意愿偏弱，多头缺乏持续推动力。

关键支撑位关注9.13附近，若跌破可能进一步测试9.00整数关口；上方阻力位则位于9.23至9.30区域，只有有效突破20日均线，才有机会打开阶段性反弹空间。

操作上建议以谨慎观望为主，激进投资者可关注支撑位附近的短线低吸机会，但需严格设置止损。若价格反弹无法站稳9.23上方，仍应以高位减仓和顺势短空思路应对。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading near 9.15, holding within a narrow intraday range after a modest 0.10% gain. Price action remains slightly bearish in the short-term, mainly because AVAX/USD continues to trade below the 20-day simple moving average at 9.227. This suggests momentum has not fully shifted back in favor of buyers. However, the limited downside movement around current levels indicates sellers may be losing strength, potentially setting up a stabilization phase if broader crypto sentiment improves.

The MACD reading remains negative at -0.044, reflecting lingering bearish momentum and weak trend conviction. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value alone points to reduced buying pressure and cautious market participation. RSI data is not available, but current consolidation near session lows implies neutral-to-weak momentum rather than oversold conditions. Traders should monitor whether AVAX can reclaim the 9.20–9.25 zone, which would improve the short-term technical outlook and increase the probability of recovery continuation.

Immediate support is forming near the recent low at 9.138, followed by a stronger psychological support area around 9.00. A breakdown below 9.00 could accelerate bearish pressure toward the 8.80 region. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 9.23 at the SMA(20), with stronger resistance around 9.40 where previous selling activity may re-emerge. A sustained move above these levels would indicate improving bullish momentum and potentially attract short-term speculative buying interest.

For traders, the current environment favors a cautious approach rather than aggressive positioning. Short-term traders may consider range-based strategies between 9.00 support and 9.25 resistance until a confirmed breakout occurs. Conservative buyers could wait for a close above the moving average before entering long positions, while bearish traders may look for weakness below 9.00 as confirmation of renewed downside momentum. Risk management remains essential due to the market’s low volatility and uncertain directional strength.
